zh.lifeSummary: 當Barnabie Powell於1543年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Sir Robert Powell35歲，母親Johanne Dobson33歲。他於1573年與Agnes Webbe在英國維爾爾米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1602年在英國英格蘭素福爾可科華士 希斯享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可科華士 希斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barnabie Powell于1543年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Sir Robert Powell35岁，母亲Johanne Dobson33岁。他于1573年与Agnes Webbe在英国維爾爾米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1602年在英国英格兰素福爾可科華士 希斯享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可科華士 希斯。

nameMeanings.name: Powell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Hywel ‘son of Hywel’, a personal name meaning ‘eminent’ (see Howell ).
Irish: mainly of Welsh origin as in 1 above, but sometimes a surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phóil ‘son of the servant of Saint Paul’ (see Guilfoyle ).
English: variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

variants.name: Powel
meanings: North German: from a form of the personal name   Paul  .

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Welsh and English: in the Welsh border counties, from the Welsh male personal name Hywel ‘eminent’, popular since the Middle Ages particularly in honor of the great 10th-century law-giving Welsh king. The name may also arise from the Breton personal name Houuel, Huwel, Huwal, Howael, cognate with the Welsh name. Bretons were especially numerous in the eastern counties of England. See Powell .
English: perhaps from a Middle English personal name Huwel (spelled Howel), a shortening of Huwelot or Huelin (see Hewlett and Huling ), both pet forms of Middle English Huw (see Hugh ).
English: habitational name from Howell (Lincolnshire), from an uncertain initial element + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

variants.name: Powles
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Powells, itself a variant of Powell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Barnabie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Barnabas
meanings: From the New Testament, where Barnabas represents a Greek form of an Aramaic name meaning ‘son of consolation’. St Barnabas was a Jewish Cypriot, one of the earliest Christian missionaries, who sold his property and gave the proceeds to the Church. He worked with St Paul until about ad 48 .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Barnabie Powell was born in 1543, in Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Powell, was 35 and his mother, Johanne Dobson, was 33. He married Agnes Webbe in 1573, in Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1602, in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barnabie Powell est né en 1543, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Powell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Johanne Dobson, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Webbe en 1573, à Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1602, à Forest Heath, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Forest Heath, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barnabie Powell 1543 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Powell 35 und seine Mutter Johanne Dobson 33. Er hat 1573 in Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England Agnes Webbe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1602 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barnabie Powell è nato il nel 1543 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Powell, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Johanne Dobson, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Webbe nel 1573, nel Mildenhall, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1602, nel Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Barnabie Powellが1543年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Powellは35歳，母Johanne Dobsonは33歳であった。1573年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアミルデンハルでAgnes Webbeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1602年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Barnabie Powell(이)가 1543년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Powell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanne Dobson(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1573년 영국 윌츠히르 미데홀에서 Agnes Webbe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1602년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 포레스트 히스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 포레스트 히스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barnabie Powell nasceu em 1543, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Powell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Johanne Dobson, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Webbe em 1573, em Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1602, em Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barnabie Powell родился в 1543 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Powell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanne Dobson, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Webbe в 1573 г. в местности маилденолл, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1602 г. в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barnabie Powell nació en 1543, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Powell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Johanne Dobson, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Agnes Webbe en 1573, en Mildenhall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1602, en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
